name: Unlimited Cash Rewards Credit Card

verdict.text: 1.5% ongoing is average — Customized Cash earns more if you'll manage it

earn_note: The 2% rate only applies for the first 12 months from account opening; after that it drops to a flat 1.5% with no caps or categories to track. Enrolled BofA Rewards members get a 10–75% bonus on top of these rates depending on combined deposit/investment balance.

redemption_options.method: Deposit to a Bank of America checking or savings account

points.note: Straightforward flat-rate cash back with no minimum redemption and no expiration while the account stays open.

transfer_partners.highlight: No transfer currency — straight cash back, not a points program.

insurance.detail: Not responsible for fraudulent transactions once reported
Not publicly documented for this card
Not publicly documented for this card
Not publicly documented for this card

protection_note: Bank of America's purchase/travel protection suite is only advertised on the Premium Rewards cards — it isn't published for this card despite the shared Visa Signature network tier.
rental_note: No auto rental coverage documented publicly for this card as of this writing.

services.name: $200 welcome bonus
services.detail: One-time $200 cash bonus after $1,000 in purchases within the first 90 days.

services.name: 0% intro APR
services.detail: 0% on purchases and balance transfers (within 60 days) for the first 15 billing cycles, then 17.49%–27.49% variable.

services.name: Intro balance transfer fee
services.detail: 3% for the first 60 days the account is open, then 5% on all future transfers.

services.name: BofA Rewards bonus
services.detail: 10% (Member), 25% (Preferred Plus), 50% (Preferred Honors), or 75% (Premier) bonus on cash back earned, based on combined Bank of America/Merrill balance.

additional_cards.title: Authorized users

benefits.text: Earns cash back on their spend (into your account)

additional_cards.note: No cost to add — flat-rate earning means there's no category math to coordinate across users.
